task: A*-FREE maze navigation via hierarchy (trained WITH A*, evaluated WITHOUT A*)
eval: 16 held-out 21x21 mazes, no waypoints/prior/fallback from A* at eval
headline: A learned SubgoalPredictor (high-level, supervised on A* waypoints) + a low-level reacher (fine WM 1-step wall-aware + probe, blocked-skip) navigates 21x21 mazes A*-FREE at 31.25%, vs 0% for greedy without hierarchy. A* is used only as a training teacher, never at eval.
cotrain_note: Joint fine-tuning (encoder+predictor+probe+subgoal, shared latent) HURT (31.25->12.50): the subgoal loss rose during co-training (encoder LR 2e-4 shifted the representation toward dynamics and broke the warm-started subgoal head). Honest negative; needs much lower encoder LR / staged unfreezing.
